semantic.role: This document provides a structured template for reporting bugs in the ArchSpine project, ensuring consistency and completeness in bug submissions.
responsibilities: Defining the format for bug reports covering runtime, CLI, MCP, and documentation issues.
Collecting key information such as observed vs expected behavior, reproduction steps, environment details, and logs/screenshots.
Directing security-related issues to a private disclosure process.
outOfScope: Feature requests, documentation improvements, or security vulnerability disclosures (these are handled by separate templates or processes).
General questions or support requests beyond bug reporting.

English.purpose: To standardize how users report bugs in ArchSpine, ensuring maintainers receive all necessary details (reproduction steps, environment, logs) for efficient diagnosis and resolution.
English.context_and_audience: This template is for contributors and users of ArchSpine who encounter bugs in the runtime, CLI commands, MCP server, or documentation. It is intended for public issue tracking on GitHub, with the exception of security issues which have a private channel.
key_takeaways: When reporting a bug, use this template and fill out all required fields: summary, reproduction, environment, and optionally logs.
The template helps distinguish bugs from feature requests and security disclosures.
Provide exact commands, file paths, and error outputs to speed up the triage process.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 该文档提供了一个结构化的错误报告模板，用于规范 ArchSpine 项目的错误提交流程，确保提交信息的完整性和一致性。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 此模板适用于 ArchSpine 的贡献者和用户，在遇到运行时错误、CLI 命令故障、MCP 服务问题或文档错误时使用。公开问题使用 GitHub Issues 提交，但安全相关问题需遵循 SECURITY.md 中的私密披露流程。
key_takeaways: 报告错误时，请使用此模板并填写所有必填字段：摘要、复现步骤、运行环境以及日志或截图（可选）。
该模板有助于区分错误、功能请求和安全披露。
提供准确的命令、文件路径和错误输出，有助于加快问题排查速度。
